title: Giggi Bamboo Cheese Board Gift set | Cheese Board with 4 Piece Cheese knives | Charcuterie Board | Cheese board and knife set for Birthday Gifts Parties Perfect Cheese board set
features: 【Luxurious Cheese Board Gift Set 】Giggi Cheese board with 4 piece Stainless steel cheese knife set is ideal gift for your Loved ones whoever it maybe Mom, Dad, Grandparents, Wife, Son, Daughter, Boyfriend or Girlfriend. In addition this cheese board is also perfect gift for any occasion e.g. Picnic, Christmas gift, House warming present, an Anniversary gift etc. With its unique rich feature set and premium quality, this is going to be a memorable cheese gift set for your loved ones!

【Unique Design with Comprehensive Feature Set】Giggi's cheese board and knife set has comprehensive feature list for any occasion. These cheese boards comes with specially crafted Stainless Steel knives of different shapes with bamboo handles. The removeable cheese knives set will keep your cheese knives organised. The cheese board set has two groove sections: Small Section is designed for condiments, sauces, jams etc. while the larger section ideal fruit, delicious meat , Sushi etc.

【Practical & Multipurpose for Any Occasion 】The rich feature set of this premium luxury wooden cheese board enables you to create professional and artistic cheese platter display, whether you want to treat yourself or throw a party & impress your guests. These cheese board has large surface area for cutting the cheese and dedicated groves to store and display delicious food. You can use this cheese board and knife set to serve cheese, appetisers, fruit, crackers, hors d'oeuvres, nuts etc.

【Premium Quality & Eco-friendly】Giggi's luxury cheese board set is made of 100% premium sustainable bamboo wood, even the handles of the cheese knife set are made up of bamboo wood. The bamboo cheese board offers generous space with dimensions of 35.6cm x 28cm x 1.5cm (L x W x H). Excluding the two grooves and knife set, Giggi's large cheese board still has large preparation area of 32 cm x 21.5cm, offering plenty of space for cutting & serving board for your favorite cheeses & appetizers!

【5 STAR UK SERVICE & MONEY BACK GAURANTEE 】Our design team in UK has specially designed our cheeseboards sets with cheese lovers in mind not only to meet product quality but to exceed expectation our customers expectations. If for any reason our product doesn’t live up your expectations, feel free to contact us for a replacement or a full refund (per Amazon T&C's). Our UK base customer care team aim to resolve your query within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Easy to clean 100% Natural Bamboo Our premium 100% Natural Bamboo cheese board is not only durable and naturally anti bacterial, but it is also very easy to clean! Simply wash it in soapy water and leave it to airdry! Perfect Gift for Any Occasions Our superior quality bamboo cheese board makes an ideal gift for any Occasion, whether it's Christmas, Mother's day , Fathers Day, Thanksgiving, Valentine's day or even your family or friends' birthday... Entertaining Has Never Been Easier Serve your cheese, crackers and charcuterie on our elegant looking cheese board. Impress your guests with the impeccable presentation of antipasti, desserts, fresh fruits or anything else – making sure it always looks good enough to eat by artfully arranging your selection on the cheese board. Premium 4 stainless steel cheese knives Our Unique knife stand can be attached to the cheese board, so the premium quality stainless steel knives are kept organised and displayed for the ease of your guests. Each knife features a high-quality bamboo wood handle and stainless steel knives to ensure that each cheese knife is strong, lightweight, and durable. Premium Quality Products designed in UK Giggi is a proudly family run British Business. All our products are designed with care by our team of young designers here in heart of UK. We believe in providing all our customers with exceptional experience. All our products are ethically sourced, and we do our utmost to use materials that minimise damage to the planet. Our passion is simply to provide our customers luxury household goods at an affordable cost, hence we never compromise on quality. All our reviews are genuine, from real customers who have used our products to enhance their lifestyle.
